description: Persistent accept-list of editorially-verified scanner false positives for the book/tools/audit/ pipeline. Pass 16 Item B improved the h3_titlecase detector so that all 75 Pass-15-era FPs are now correctly classified at the detector level (see accept_list.py + h3_titlecase.py for details, and Pass 15 FINAL ledgers at /Users/VJ/Desktop/MIT_Press_Feedback/15_audit_loop/ledgers/ for the historical record). This file is retained as infrastructure for any future false positives that new check categories may surface. Every entry must be justified by a specific clause of book-prose-merged.md §10.9 or equivalent.
